page.title: Agent
page.description: Configure how your AI receptionist behaves, what it knows, and how it handles calls and messages.

basicSettings.title: AI settings
basicSettings.description: Greeting and transfer settings for your receptionist.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.description: Information and guidelines your receptionist uses to answer questions.

websiteImport.title: Import Website
websiteImport.description: Crawl the public pages of your website so your receptionist can use them as knowledge.
websiteImport.success: Website import started. Pages will appear here as they finish processing.
websiteImport.submitFailed: We couldn't start the website import. Please try again.
websiteImport.previewPending: We're crawling this website. Imported pages will appear here automatically.

validation.urlRequired: Enter a website URL to import.

knowledge.addKnowledgeDescription: Add opening hours, pricing, policies, or any other information your receptionist should know.
knowledge.editKnowledgeDescription: Update the information your receptionist should use when answering customer questions.
knowledge.uploadDocumentDescription: Upload a file so your receptionist can use it.

uploadValidation.unsupportedFile: Supported document types are PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown.
uploadValidation.maxSize: Documents must be 10 MB or smaller.
uploadValidation.uploadFailed: We couldn't upload this document. Please try again.

file.label: File
file.hint: Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown.
file.dropzonePrefix: Drag and drop a file here, or

websiteUrl.label: Website URL
websiteUrl.hint: Use the public home page or section you want to import.

title.label: Title
title.hint: A short, descriptive title for this piece of knowledge.

content.label: Content
content.placeholder: We are open Monday to Friday from 9am to 5pm.
content.hint: The actual information the receptionist should use.

tags.label: Tags (optional)
tags.hint: Comma-separated keywords to help categorize this knowledge.

services.title: Services
services.description: Service details your receptionist can use to explain offerings and help book the right appointment.
services.addKnowledgeDescription: Add your services, what they include, who they are for, and anything your receptionist should mention.
services.editKnowledgeDescription: Update the service details your receptionist should mention and use while booking.
services.uploadDocumentDescription: Upload a file so your receptionist can use it.

uploadValidation.unsupportedFile: Supported document types are PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown.
uploadValidation.maxSize: Documents must be 10 MB or smaller.
uploadValidation.uploadFailed: We couldn't upload this document. Please try again.

file.label: File
file.hint: Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown.
file.dropzonePrefix: Drag and drop a file here, or

title.label: Title
title.hint: A short, descriptive title for this service.

content.label: Content
content.placeholder: A 30-minute consultation to understand the caller's needs and recommend the right next step.
content.hint: Describe the service so the receptionist can explain it clearly.

duration.label: Duration
duration.hint: Appointment length in minutes for availability checks.

active.label: Bookable
active.hint: Only bookable services are offered during calls.

tags.label: Tags (optional)
tags.hint: Comma-separated keywords to help categorize these services.

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: Instructions that guide how your receptionist should handle calls and messages.
rules.addKnowledgeDescription: What your receptionist should do, like transfer calls, ask questions and send texts.
rules.editKnowledgeDescription: Update the instruction your receptionist should follow during calls and follow-up flows.
rules.uploadDocumentDescription: Upload a file so your receptionist can use it.

uploadValidation.unsupportedFile: Supported document types are PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown.
uploadValidation.maxSize: Documents must be 10 MB or smaller.
uploadValidation.uploadFailed: We couldn't upload this document. Please try again.

file.label: File
file.hint: Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown.
file.dropzonePrefix: Drag and drop a file here, or

title.label: Title
title.placeholder: Transfer requests to talk to someone to Jannie
title.hint: A short, descriptive title for this rule.

content.label: Content
content.placeholder: When someone asks to speak to a human, transfer them to 555-123-4567.
content.hint: Describe what the receptionist should do.

tags.label: Tags (optional)
tags.hint: Comma-separated keywords to help categorize these rules.

table.title: Title
table.documentPreviewUnavailable: Document preview is available on the Knowledge page.

greeting.label: Greeting
greeting.hint: The opening line your receptionist uses when answering a call or starting a conversation.

defaultLocale.label: Default customer language
defaultLocale.hint: Choose the fallback language your receptionist should use when a caller's preference is unknown.

transferNumber.label: Default transfer number
transferNumber.hint: The phone number your receptionist should use when handing a caller off to a human.

errors.invalid: Enter a complete valid transfer number before saving.

allowCancel.label: Allow AI cancellations
allowCancel.hint: Let the receptionist cancel a verified future appointment.

allowReschedule.label: Allow AI rescheduling
allowReschedule.hint: Let the receptionist move a verified future appointment after availability is checked.

requireOtp.label: Require one-time code
requireOtp.hint: Send a code before any cancellation or reschedule.

actions.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove this entry from the agent workspace.
actions.cancelImportDescription: This will stop the website import and remove the in-progress entry from the table.

empty.description: Create a business first, then return here to configure your AI receptionist.
